name: Cafe Rio

identity.name: Cafe Rio
identity.locationScope: National Cafe Rio chain; no single local location in packet
identity.notes: Official Cafe Rio national site and official order locator confirmed; locations are not merged.

restaurantLevelAllergenEvidence.claim: Individual foods may contact one another; Cafe Rio does not guarantee cross-contact will not occur.
Tortilla chips, tortilla strips, and coconut shrimp use common fryer oil.
Key Lime Pie, mild tomatillo sauce, medium green sauce, shrimp, and queso may be exposed to facilities manufacturing peanuts/tree nuts.

notes: POC catalog and every frozen item were coordinator-reconciled.
All four official-matrix search classes completed; direct positives are retained and missing disclosure remains unavailable.
POC closeout uses a verified target-specific catalog transformation; shared-parser review is deferred.

adjudication.rationale: Research structure, current product mappings, direct allergen authority, target repair, Ingredient Intelligence timing, focused validation, and idempotency passed the POC terminal gates.

evidence.excerpt: Officially linked nutritional/allergen brochure with X=contains allergen, GF, vegetarian, soy-oil notation, cross-contact warning, and item rows.
Official Cafe Rio Mexican Grill homepage with Our Food, Order, Locations, and Nutrition navigation.
Official location selector for pickup and delivery.

notes: POC worker artifacts persisted by the root coordinator.

repairs.summary: Applied and validated the restaurant-specific POC catalog repair.
